title: Critical Functions Observatory — defensive UAS / critical-infrastructure research lab
public_claim: A defensive UAS and critical-infrastructure research observatory built around national critical functions rather than generic drone security.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes malicious-UAS and infrastructure risk through a function-first defensive-research model: CISA National Critical Functions, FAA Remote ID, White House guidance, DOJ/DHS/FAA/FCC legal-advisory constraints, OT asset inventory, DOE/EPA-relevant function dependencies, semantic graphs, provenance vaulting, publication forge outputs, and recomputable projection logic. It also guards against turning defensive analysis into operational attack guidance by filtering timing, payload, and bypass details.
